name: Cram 101 Inc Which Will Do Bus
registry_source: California Secretary of State (via cabusinessdb.com, CA SOS bizfile)
notes: Name is truncated from 'CRAM 101, INC. WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS CRAM 101 OPEDIA' — Delaware-domiciled foreign stock corp registered in CA on 2009-09-01, principal at 1320 Flynn Rd Unit C, Camarillo, CA 93012. This is the textbook outline publisher Cram101, NOT a school-bus operator. SAFER keyword search for 'CRAM 101' returned no matching FMCSA carrier. The closest SAFER hit 'CRAM INC' (USDOT 2997603) is a Michigan-based freight carrier — not a match. No bus operations identified.

name: CMR Inc Which Will Do Bus
registry_source: California Secretary of State (bizfileonline.sos.ca.gov) — no confident match for 'CMR Inc' at 3084 Linea Ter, Palm Springs
notes: Name is truncated from 'CMR INC. WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN [STATE] AS ...' Address 3084 Linea Ter, Palm Springs CA 92264 is a residential property. SAFER keyword search for 'CMR INC' returned no match. Other CMR carriers exist in SAFER (CMR Transport Inc USDOT 1256445, CMR Transport LLC USDOT 3390996, CMR Trucking LLC USDOT 2380327) but none tied to Palm Springs or to bus/passenger operations. No confident FMCSA match.

name: Lane Cindy Bus Svc
registry_source: Tennessee Secretary of State (sos.tn.gov) — no confident match found for 'Lane Cindy Bus Svc' or 'Cindy Lane Bus Service'
notes: Address 117 Winchester Ln, Smyrna TN 37167 is a residential property (per Homes.com listing). SAFER keyword searches for 'CINDY LANE BUS' and 'LANE CINDY' both returned no records. Likely an unregistered owner-operator small bus service (name format 'Lane, Cindy Bus Svc' = sole-proprietor named Cindy Lane). No FMCSA USDOT registration found. TN SOS entity search inconclusive without direct portal access.

name: Herman Corp Which Will Do Bus

notes: Name is truncated from 'HERMAN CORP WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN [STATE] AS ...' Address 11923 N 173rd Cir, Bennington NE 68007 is a residential property (built 2014, owned by Richard & Sherry Herman per public records). SAFER keyword search for 'HERMAN CORP' returned no match. Several other Herman-named carriers exist in SAFER (Herman Bros Inc USDOT 2157164, Herman Inc USDOT 810787, etc.) but none located at Bennington NE or operating buses. No confident FMCSA bus-operator match identified.

name: Execucorp Inc Which Will Do
